glm_summary: The pricing score of 0.4983 is weak primarily due to an average profit margin of only 11.57%, which falls below industry benchmarks despite a price-to-market ratio of 1.45 indicating prices are set 45% above market averages. This disconnect suggests that while the restaurants are charging premium prices relative to competitors, their cost structures or pricing strategies are not effectively converting that premium into healthy profitability, resulting in the 'average margin' driver dragging down overall pricing performance.
